Short-run decision: special order,
make-or-buy, drop a product, marginal pricing

that must NOT reward building inventory

ABSORPTION (required).

VARIABLE.
Income tracks SALES, not production

ABSORPTION or ABC.
A sustained price below full cost
erodes capital
